title: Rodian Galactic Drama Troupe
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Rodian Galactic Drama Troupe''' was the most famous all-[[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] traveling group of [[Rodian Theater/Legends|Rodian Theater]], and the only dramatic corps allowed by the [[Grand Protector/Legends|Grand Protector]] to travel off-[[Rodia/Legends|planet]].

Run by [[Entukan Yesosko]], it consisted of 200 elite [[actor/Legends|performers]], directors, agents, musicians and other technicians. Technical staff sometimes participated in minor roles.<ref name="planets">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

It circulated along [[the galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]'s most prestigious entertainment districts, performing the best of Rodian drama, notably portraying accurately (and shockingly) all forms of violence. It used to stay to a certain location for several [[standard week/Legends|weeks]], performing a variety of shows.<ref name="planets" />

The Grand Protector [[Navik the Red]], having learned that rogue Rodians attended their performances, assigned some [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] to shadow the group; Yesosko was tasked to inform the hunters about their movements at all times. However, this has been discovered by some group members, who, opposing Navik, try to sabotage the process; other members were aware but were afraid of Yesosko's reaction.<ref name="planets" />

==Appearances==
